summary: Blank Slate Reset & Last Time Hints feature fully tested. All 7 specified features verified working after metro bundler restart fixed a stale-bundle issue. 13/13 backend tests pass. Full E2E frontend flow confirmed: inputs clear to empty strings after completing a workout, Last time hints correctly update, DB persists blank slate.
action_items: ENVIRONMENT NOTE: During this iteration, the metro bundler was serving a stale cached bundle that pre-dated the blank slate code changes. Running `sudo supervisorctl restart expo` resolved this and caused all frontend tests to pass. Ensure the metro bundler cache is cleared before future E1 code deployments if the metro bundle appears to not reflect latest changes.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend session/complete endpoint: comment on line 3653 says 'keep weight/reps, uncheck only' but the actual code DOES clear weight and reps — the comment is misleading and should be updated to match the actual behavior.

Backend session/complete clears performance AND frontend savePerformance also clears — there are two sequential writes to the same data. While harmless, the double-clear is redundant since session/complete already handles the DB-side clearing. Frontend save is kept for UI state consistency.
updated_files: /app/frontend/app/workout-detail.tsx (added/removed debug logs — net change is 0, file is restored to original)
/app/backend/tests/test_blank_slate_reset.py (NEW: 13-test pytest file for blank slate + last session)
seed_data_creation: Used existing user cbd82a69-3a37-48c2-88e8-0fe95081fa4b with workout 2d58d2e4-178c-4627-ad56-dee8bbc2d36b. Repeatedly restored performance data via POST /api/workout/{id}/performance to simulate mid-workout state before each test run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Blank slate and Last time hints fully verified. Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_blank_slate_reset.py covers all lifecycle states. Verified user: cbd82a69-3a37-48c2-88e8-0fe95081fa4b, workout: 2d58d2e4-178c-4627-ad56-dee8bbc2d36b. Metro bundler restart was required to pick up latest frontend code — always restart expo before frontend testing if UI behavior seems wrong.
rca_of_issue: Initial frontend tests showed blank slate NOT working (inputs staying filled with old weight/reps values). Root cause: the metro bundler was serving a stale cached bundle from BEFORE E1 implemented the blank slate clearing code. Evidence: (1) Bundle did not contain 'blank-slate' debug string after my code additions until after metro restart. (2) After `sudo supervisorctl restart expo`, the new bundle correctly cleared inputs and the network capture showed weight:'' being sent to the backend. (3) 13/13 backend tests always passed — the backend code was always correct. Resolution: `sudo supervisorctl restart expo` to force metro to serve fresh bundle.
